attack_or_scenario: Use an unrelated approved objective as the source for segment and positioning signals
recommended_fix: Bind sources to exact supports_signals capability

attack_or_scenario: Use traversal or symlink parent to redirect output
evidence: Path.resolve normalized traversal and parents were not inspected
recommended_fix: Repository-relative paths, reject traversal and every symlink component

attack_or_scenario: Recorded approvals also appeared under approvals required
Test failed at absolute-path guard rather than malformed workspace validation
recommended_fix: Use repository-relative temporary malformed workspace and assert error

attack_or_scenario: Use an approved campaign-chief record for one purpose to satisfy a different strategic gate requiring the same role
evidence: Post-merge review found approvals were indexed globally by role rather than by role and gate
impact: Cross-purpose approval substitution could make field mobilization, paid media or narrative gates eligible without the intended approval
recommended_fix: Require supports_gates on every approval and evaluate approved roles independently per gate
